# AGENTS.md

<!-- Auto-generated by scripts/generate_publish_artifacts.py -->

This repository provides agent skills for GO/GSEA enrichment workflows.

## Available Skills

- **go-enrichment-reliability**
  - Description: Natural-language-first GO/GSEA copilot that auto-runs reliability-checked enrichment (Python-first, R fallback), benchmarks against Enrichr/g:Profiler/clusterProfiler/Broad proxy, and returns interpretable cell-type-focused conclusions with follow-up discussion prompts.
  - Path: `skills/go-enrichment-reliability/SKILL.md`

## Usage

- Mention the skill name directly (for example: `$go-enrichment-reliability`).
- Or ask for a task that matches the skill description.
